patches_applied.action: Inserted defense-neutralization content (alpha-as-fitted-coefficient steelman rebuttal, 2 paragraphs). Closes ISS-1838.

Softened Bradley attribution: replaced "explicitly tested and rejected atmospheric refraction as an explanation: refraction is wavelength-dependent (chromatic)" with geometric-grounds framing. Modern dispersion theory closes the case independently.

Replaced all 5 occurrences of HTML-entity negative sign "−10 to −13 µGal" with positive-magnitude "10–13 µGal". First occurrence annotated "(positive magnitude per data/predictions.json)" for cross-WIN convention consistency with WIN-014 H11 patch. Closes ISS-1836.
Updated both TLDRs to surface PRED-TIER-3 self-contradiction and SG-class instrument hierarchy argument. Per curmudgeon recommended text. Closes ISS-1837.
